case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. CARLOS MANUEL KUK COUCH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KUK COUCH, CARLOS MANUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUK COUCH, CARLOS MANUEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DIANA PERDOMO--SENIOR COLLECTION SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARITZA ZURITA. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT KUK COUCH, CARLOS MANUEL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KUK COUCH, CARLOS MANUEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED FEB-24-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KUK COUCH, CARLOS MANUEL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $35.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $100.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT KUK COUCH, CARLOS MANUEL
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. KUK COUCH, CARLOS MANUEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KUK COUCH, CARLOS MANUEL
